daily.today_energy: The cosmic vibes are inviting you to lean into your intuition today, Pisces. You're picking up on subtle shifts around you—trust that inner knowing. It's a day for gentle momentum, not force.
daily.love: Someone's noticing the quiet magic you've been radiating lately. Whether you're single or coupled up, today asks you to be vulnerable about what you actually want. Authenticity is your love language rn.
daily.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different today. Don't sleep on that instinct to pitch something unconventional—your vibe attracts the right collaborators. Channel that dreamer energy into something tangible.
daily.health: Your body's asking for slowness today. Rest isn't lazy; it's strategic. Whether that's a walk, stretching, or just unplugging for a bit, honor what feels nourishing. Your nervous system will thank you.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your sector of introspection, Pisces. This week invites you to pause and listen to what your intuition's been whispering. Trust the quiet moments—they're teaching you something real.
weekly.love: Venus is softening the edges around your heart. Whether you're single or coupled up, this is prime time for vulnerable conversations that actually land. Let people see the real you, mess and all.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is hitting different right now. Channel that into projects that feel authentic, even if they seem unconventional. Your unique perspective is literally your superpower—stop doubting it.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more gentleness this week. This is your sign to prioritize rest without guilt, move in ways that feel good rather than punishing, and hydrate like it's your job.
